From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1973 comedy film

| The Three Musketeers of the West | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") |
| Written by | Leonardo Martín   Bruno Corbucci  Tito Carpi  [Peter Berling](/wiki/Peter_Berling "Peter Berling") |
| Starring | [Timothy Brent](/wiki/Giancarlo_Prete "Giancarlo Prete")  [George Eastman](/wiki/George_Eastman_(actor) "George Eastman (actor)") |
| Cinematography | Rafael Pacheco |
| Music by | [Carlo Rustichelli](/wiki/Carlo_Rustichelli "Carlo Rustichelli") |
| Release date | * 28 September 1973 (1973-09-28) |
| Running time | 87 minutes |
| Countries | Italy Spain West Germany |
| Language | Italian |

***Tutti per uno... botte per tutti***, internationally released as ***The Three Musketeers of the West***, is a 1973 Italian [spaghetti Western](/wiki/Spaghetti_Western "Spaghetti Western")-[comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci").

It is a western-comedy version of [Alexandre Dumas](/wiki/Alexandre_Dumas "Alexandre Dumas")' novel *[The Three Musketeers](/wiki/The_Three_Musketeers "The Three Musketeers")*.[[1]](#cite_note-sed-1) It has been described as "one of the craziest Spaghetti Westerns ever made" and "an over the top comedy vehicle from start to finish".[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Three_Musketeers_of_the_West&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Timothy Brent](/wiki/Giancarlo_Prete "Giancarlo Prete") as [Dart Coldwater Jr.](/wiki/D%27Artagnan "D'Artagnan")
* [George Eastman](/wiki/George_Eastman_(actor) "George Eastman (actor)") as [Mc Athos](/wiki/Athos_(character) "Athos (character)")
* [Chris Huerta](/wiki/Chris_Huerta "Chris Huerta") as [Portland](/wiki/Porthos "Porthos")
* [Leo Anchóriz](/wiki/Leo_Anch%C3%B3riz "Leo Anchóriz") as [Aramirez](/wiki/Aramis "Aramis")
* [Karin Schubert](/wiki/Karin_Schubert "Karin Schubert") as Alice
* [Eduardo Fajardo](/wiki/Eduardo_Fajardo "Eduardo Fajardo") as The Banker
* Max Turilli as Baron Von Horn
* [Vittorio Congia](/wiki/Vittorio_Congia "Vittorio Congia") as Cheese Valley village chief
* [Pietro Tordi](/wiki/Pietro_Tordi "Pietro Tordi") as Dart's father
* [José Canalejas](/wiki/Jos%C3%A9_Canalejas_(actor) "José Canalejas (actor)") as Mendoza
* [Eleonora Giorgi](/wiki/Eleonora_Giorgi "Eleonora Giorgi") as Dart's girlfriend
* Hsueh Han as Cin Ciao
